name: SL repo gauntlet preflight
what_it_solves: Preflight checklist run against the SL engine repo before allowing the MBD4/ATR receipt to be published as canon.
how_it_solves: 50KB checklist enumerating every invariant + evidence-cell status; a red row anywhere blocks canonisation.
why_it_exists: Prevents 'publish first, discover the invariant regression later' failure mode.
